w:r.w:t: LAND KINGS – FOUNDER BIOS
VERSION 1 – STANDARD
Jesse Weimer
Jesse Weimer didn’t get into land chasing trends—he got into it by seeing what others were missing.
Early on, he realized most investors were playing a short game. Buy cheap. Sell fast. Move on.
But land doesn’t reward surface-level thinking.
The real money isn’t in flipping dirt—it’s in understanding what that dirt can become.
Jesse built his approach around that idea.
Instead of just looking at comps, he looks at:
- Access
- Zoning
- Growth paths
- Subdivision potential
While others compete on price, he focuses on creating value before the deal is even done.
That’s led to a strategy centered around:
- Larger parcels
- Smarter acquisitions
- Creative deal structures
including seller financing and partnerships that most investors don’t even consider.
Today, his focus is simple:
Control better land. Structure better deals. Create outcomes that don’t exist yet on paper.
Co-Founder
While most people in real estate stay in their lane, [Partner Name] built his edge by understanding how deals actually come together from start to finish.
His strength isn’t just finding opportunities—it’s making them work.
From acquisition to negotiation to execution, he focuses on the details that determine whether a deal closes… or falls apart.
Where others see complications, he sees structure.
Where others hesitate, he finds leverage.
That shows up in how Land Kings operates today:
- Clean deal flow
- Strong seller communication
- Flexible structuring
- Execution that actually closes
Because at the end of the day, a deal isn’t real until it’s finished.
And his role is making sure it gets there.
Combined Positioning Line
Together, they built Land Kings around one principle:
Most land is undervalued—not because of the market, but because of how it’s being looked at.
Their job is to change that.
VERSION 2 – HARDER VERSION
Most people look at land and see what it is.
We look at it and see what it can become—and structure deals around that.
